title: Publish current draft as live version

requirements.text: Publish the current draft (Version 10 with the darker background theme) as the live production version without any modifications.

quotes: Please publish this draft for me as it is.

acceptanceCriteria: The current draft state, including the dark background theme, is deployed as the live version.
No code changes are made — the build reflects the draft exactly as it stands.

constraints: Do not modify any code, styles, or content — publish the draft exactly as-is.
nonGoals: Making any visual or functional changes before publishing.
